name: MHG - DO BALIK
query:
SELECT
    ds.customer AS "customer",
    DATE(dt.departure_time) AS "tgl",
    COALESCE(ds.custom_address_line, ds.address) AS "alamat",
    dt.driver_name AS "driver",
    dt.custom_assistant_name AS "kenek",
    dt.vehicle AS "vehicle",
    ds.delivery_note AS "delivery_note",
    dn.total_qty AS "total_qty",
    dn.grand_total AS "grand_total",
    ds.visited AS "visited",
    ds.custom_reason AS "reason",
    dt.name AS "delivery_trip"
FROM
    `tabDelivery Trip` dt
JOIN
    `tabDelivery Stop` ds ON ds.parent = dt.name
JOIN 
    `tabDelivery Note` dn ON ds.delivery_note = dn.name
WHERE 
  ds.visited = 1
  AND ds.custom_reason = 'Terkirim'
  AND DATE(dt.departure_time)  BETWEEN %(start_date)s AND %(end_date)s
